findings.evidence: Lines 153-156 define `ClassGroup := WeilDivisor X ⧸ S.principalSubgroup`; `rg -n "def Pic|abbrev Pic|structure Pic|equivPic|Picard" TauCeti` finds no Picard comparison in the PR code.
findings.fix: Reword this as constructing the divisor-class side/preparation for the later `Cl(X) ≅ Pic X` comparison, or add the actual Picard comparison in a later file with accurate documentation.
findings.issue: The module docstring says this file realizes the roadmap item `Cl(X) ≅ Pic X`, but the file only defines `OrderSystem.ClassGroup` as a quotient of Weil divisors and contains no Picard group or equivalence to it.

findings.evidence: The module docstring advertises "the characterization of equal classes" at lines 29-30, and the public lemma is declared at lines 170-172 without a preceding `/-- ... -/`.
findings.fix: Add a docstring stating that two divisors have the same divisor class exactly when their difference is principal/they are linearly equivalent.
findings.issue: `divisorClass_eq_iff` is a central public characterization of equality in the class group, but it has no docstring.

findings.evidence: The PR description and API make this the advertised recovery theorem, and the public lemma at lines 220-223 has no preceding docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring explaining that the class of a divisor lies in `picZero` iff that representative has weighted degree zero under the descended degree map.
findings.issue: `divisorClass_mem_picZero` is the main public representative criterion for `picZero`, but it has no docstring.

summary: The new file has a module docstring and documents the public definitions, but the documentation overclaims the Picard comparison and leaves central public characterization lemmas undocumented.
